name: Aditya Yadav

about.summary: Enthusiastic Computer Engineering student at Lokmanya Tilak College of Engineering with a strong foundation in Java, Python, and Full Stack Development. Experienced in building AI-powered systems and healthcare applications. Passionate about creating innovative solutions and scaling complex systems.
about.objective: Passionate Computer Engineering student with a solid foundation in Java, Python, and C++. Skilled in problem-solving and software development, seeking an opportunity to contribute to innovative projects and grow in a dynamic tech environment.

education.institution: St. John The Baptist High School

experience.description: Worked on real-world AI applications and projects under IBM SkillsBuild program.
Developed Python-based scripts and contributed to backend logic.

projects.title: Samay Schedulr
projects.description: Samay Schedulr combines NLP (Natural Language Processing) and AI Intelligence to analyze your syllabus, parse timetables, and generate personalized study roadmaps—all in one smart platform.

projects.title: Medichain
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered hospital system using Natural Language Processing (NLP) to analyze symptoms, determine severity, and guide patient care.

projects.title: Caairmate
projects.description: A healthcare application designed to assist patients and doctors with appointment booking, prescription management, and health tracking.

projects.title: Dropout Defender
projects.description: A Machine Learning-powered web application built to predict and reduce student dropout risk in schools using advanced algorithms.

achievements: Finalist in CODEBYTE 2.0 Hackathon (Top 20 of 90+ teams)
